sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state of the grid after rotating the bottom row right by 4 positions. Let me see the current bottom row.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
grid = {}
for n in nodes:
    p = n['pixels']
    if p in [4, 8, 16]:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = b[0][0]
        c = b[0][1]
        grid[(r, c)] = n['color']
sorted_keys = sorted(grid.keys())
print("CURRENT:")
for k in sorted_keys:
    print("%d,%d: %s" % (k[0], k[1], grid[k]))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
